The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data
summary: The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data fields are currently a preview feature.

title: The Publish brand template API is now available as a preview. It publishes a design as a brand template, creating a new brand template or updating an
summary: The Publish brand template API is now available as a preview. It publishes a design as a brand template, creating a new brand template or updating an existing one if the design is a draft of an existing template.

title: The Get design export formats API now returns page-level format options. Each format includes the page_numbers that support it. If a format is support
summary: The Get design export formats API now returns page-level format options. Each format includes the page_numbers that support it. If a format is supported by every page in the design, its page_numbers are omitted.

title: The List folder items API now supports brand_template as an item type. Brand templates in folders are returned in the response and can be filtered usi
summary: The List folder items API now supports brand_template as an item type. Brand templates in folders are returned in the response and can be filtered using the item_types parameter.
